description: ONDEWO Text to Speech (T2S) Client library for Typescript

scripts.pretest: tsc auth/offlineTokenProvider.ts auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build
scripts.test: c8 --check-coverage --lines 100 --branches 100 --functions 100 --include '**/offlineTokenProvider.js' --exclude '**/*.spec.js' --reporter text node --test .test-build/offlineTokenProvider.spec.js && npm run test:examples
scripts.pretest:examples: tsc examples/ts-client.ts examples/ts-client.spec.ts --ignoreConfig --rootDir . --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --lib es2020,dom --skipLibCheck --sourceMap --types node --typeRoots ./node_modules/@types --outDir .test-build && rm -rf .test-build/api && cp -R api .test-build/api
